# WordSpies

> WordSpies is a free online Codenames-style word game for 4 to 10+ players. Two teams race to find their secret words from one-word spymaster clues while avoiding the hidden assassin word. It runs in any web browser with no sign-up, no download and no account — players create a room, share a 4-letter code, and play together on any phone or laptop.

## Key facts
- Name: WordSpies
- URL: https://wordspies.co.uk
- Play the game: https://wordspies.co.uk/play
- Price: Free (no sign-up, no account, no download)
- Players: 4 to 10+, two teams (red and blue), each with a spymaster and guessers
- Category: Online word game, party game, team game (Codenames-style / like Codenames)
- Platforms: Any web browser on phone, tablet or laptop
- Contact: contact@wordspies.co.uk
- WordSpies is an independent game and is not affiliated with Codenames or Czech Games Edition.

## How to play
1. One player types a name and taps "New game" to create a room, then shares the 4-letter code or invite link.
2. Friends join from their own devices, split into two teams, and one player per team becomes the spymaster.
3. Spymasters give one-word clues with a number (e.g. "OCEAN 2"); teammates discuss and tap the words they think match.
4. Find all your team's words first to win — but tapping the hidden assassin word loses the game instantly.
